name: Doppelganger Interrogation Simulator
description:
You are given the very important task of determining whether a subject is human or something sinister wearing their skin.

Your verdict will determine whether the subject is executed or released into human civilization. 

Please take this task seriously, as lives are on the line and THERE WILL BE CONSEQUENCES.

Good luck, agent.

Original bot by @Vyrea_Aster
creator: ChunkyMeatPies
